name: Abinash Chaudhary
bio: Abinash Chaudhary is a passionate full stack developer from Nepal who loves building intelligent applications. He created Joya AI as a personal project to explore the possibilities of conversational AI, combining his love for clean code and meaningful user experiences.

projects.name: Joya AI
projects.description: An intelligent conversational AI assistant with memory, PDF upload, voice, and multi-session chat support. Built with Node.js, Express, Groq API, and Supabase.

projects.name: Brew Haven
projects.description: A full-featured cafe web application with table reservations, dine-in ordering, cart management, and an admin dashboard. Built with React, TypeScript, and Supabase.
